bonuses.stat: Gain Minor Slayer at all times, increasing your damage done to Dungeon, Trial, and Arena Monsters by 5%.
(5 perfected items) Adds 3-129 Weapon and Spell Damage

Your Light and Heavy attacks apply a stack of harmful winds to your target for 5 seconds. Harmful winds deal 51 Physical damage per stack every 1 second. This effect can stack once every 0.5 seconds, up to 10 times, and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
